signals.npcLine: Market pulse's bleeding shadow dims the neon skyline.
signals.questPulse: Crypto tides sink; brace for data droughts.
signals.worldFeed: Global cap shrinks under fear's heavy hand.
signals.clueEvent: Active tokens fracturing; many lost in digital haze.

signals.npcLine: RAVE signals flat, SIREN rises in the underground.
signals.questPulse: Signal spikes hint at shifting allegiances.
signals.worldFeed: Networks pulse erratically, SIREN beacon flickers up.
signals.clueEvent: Zero-score RAVE fades; a silent cold war begins.

signals.npcLine: Fear's grip tightens; cryptic whispers on blockchain winds.
signals.questPulse: Sentiment plummets, hive minds jittery and fractured.
signals.worldFeed: Global sentiment cracks; anxious nodes dip low.
signals.clueEvent: Market fears ripple through darknet exchanges.

signals.npcLine: AVNT seeks revival amidst digital decay.
signals.questPulse: Quest to revive fading tokens begins.
signals.worldFeed: New assets stir beneath the data graveyard.
signals.clueEvent: AVNT flickers as hope in dark markets.

signals.npcLine: MON and BTC jockey for shadow dominance.
signals.questPulse: Old cryptos flex muscles amid chaos.
signals.worldFeed: Legacy chains shuffle as fear spreads.
signals.clueEvent: BTC and MON stand as pillars in storm.
